channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Alexander Zverev wins the French Open to earn his first Grand Slam title
item.description: After Flavio Cobolli missed an overhead on the second championship point, Zverev dropped to his back and sobbed.

item.title: Armenians vote in general election closely watched by Russia and the West
item.description: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan seeks a strong mandate for a new geopolitical direction for Armenia.

item.title: One million people line Madrid streets for pope's flower-adorned procession
item.description: The crowd cheered and shouted "This is the youth of the pope!" as Pope Leo arrived for Mass at a central Madrid plaza. It is the first papal visit to S...

item.title: One of the world's most isolated islands faces development with bulldozers
item.description: The Indian government is spending $9 billion to create a megaport, airport and city on this remote island. Critics fear the impact on pristine forests...
